title: Extract metastatic & relapsed/refractory outcomes
context: This task extracts metastatic and relapsed/refractory ES outcome records across the included studies into schema-valid, provenance-complete rows. This is the second half of the disease-extent extraction split (localized is eoh-extract-103). Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Extract metastatic and relapsed/refractory ES outcome records across the included studies into schema-valid, fully sourced rows passing all CI gates.
acceptanceCriteria: Metastatic and relapsed/refractory outcome records extracted across included studies; every record cites DOI/PMID + source table/figure + license.
Every record is schema-valid and passes provenance, min-cell, and no-unsourced-number CI gates.
Records double-extracted per the QA protocol; discrepancies routed to adjudication (eoh-qa-105).
output: /output/datasets/outcomes-metastatic-relapsed/ schema-valid records, committed to the repo.
